name: Investor Research Engine
description: A four-agent pipeline that discovers investors in your target space, enriches each with fund details and deal history, ranks them by fit, and crafts personalized Tier 1 outreach angles.

agents.name: scout
agents.description: Investor Finder — searches for active investors in the target space, filters by stage match, and surfaces a qualified longlist with recent deal evidence.
agents.heartbeat_description: On-demand only, triggered by fundraise mission

agents.name: analyst
agents.description: Investment Analyst — researches each investor for fund details, AUM, check size, thesis, portfolio, and most recent deal. Produces a Tier 1/2/3 ranked priority list.
agents.heartbeat_description: On-demand only, triggered by scout investor list
agents.output_format: Investor Profile → Fund Details → Portfolio Fit → Tier Assignment → Source Citations

agents.name: strategist
agents.description: Outreach Strategist — for each Tier 1 investor, identifies the specific thesis connection, closest portfolio comp, and drafts a personalized cold email under 150 words.
agents.heartbeat_description: On-demand only, triggered by analyst tier rankings
agents.output_format: Thesis Connection → Closest Portfolio Comp → Intro Channel → Draft Cold Email

agents.name: critic
agents.description: Research Reviewer — verifies accuracy of fund details, portfolio citations, and recency of deal data. Blocks packages where sources are fabricated or stale.
agents.heartbeat_description: Continuous — processes review queue as research packages arrive

team_display.short_description: Finds, evaluates, and prioritizes investors for your fundraise

review_page.context_description: Due diligence and background on each investor

quality_dimensions.label: Accuracy
quality_dimensions.description: Are fund details, names, and deal history correct?

quality_dimensions.label: Relevance
quality_dimensions.description: Does this investor actually fund this space?

quality_dimensions.label: Thesis Fit
quality_dimensions.description: Specific connection to the company, not generic AI

quality_dimensions.label: Recency
quality_dimensions.description: Is the data current? Recent deals cited?

builder.suggested_topics_placeholder: e.g., AI infrastructure, developer tools, vertical SaaS
